description: 目標語系聽力與發音層（手機 App、無真人依賴）任務包：Listening + Pronunciation/Prosody

tasks.desc: Define listening layer contract (gist/detail/inference) with mobile-first interaction constraints and TTS-only assumptions.
Define pronunciation/prosody layer contract with no-human-rater policy and explainable coaching output format.
Create TTS variation profile spec (speed/pause/intonation/noise) for listening robustness without human recordings.
Define listening item schema v1 (audio_ref, transcript_ref, question_type, evidence_span, accepted_answers).
Define pronunciation attempt schema v1 (target_utterance, learner_asr, timing, prosody_features, coaching_hints).
Add TLG-005 generator input extension for listening and pronunciation nodes, including mode-specific rubric payloads.
Implement TLG-006 gate rules for listening/pronunciation (missing audio refs, invalid evidence span, opaque scoring).
Define mobile UX constraints: max clip length, retry policy, hint cadence, offline fallback behavior.
Pilot on KO A1/A2 with 2 units: run listening + pronunciation microflow and collect QA defects.
Freeze readiness decision: define what enters stable contract vs deferred for human-recording future path.
